title: Spotlight
body:
No AI was used for this project

# Spotlight by Nytronix
### Illuminate your Game.
Cleverly Rethought.


## **What does the Resource Pack do?**
This Pack recolours basically everything important to Black and White. Also it makes the backgrounds of every Container GUI transparent. It's decent. But still detailed. I didn't change everything completely. To be honest I repixeld much. But thats not ba, it's good.

## **Why this Pack?**
I am not aiming to make the perfect Texture Pack. That's still in early stage of development. I want to enjoy the Game with a nice GUI and some minor other tweaks without actually changing to much. I think I got that right.

## **What is planned for the future?**
Mod Support is planned for release sometime in the next few months.
Also I want to further optimize the Performance of this Pack. 

## **Suggestions, Inspirations or Wishes?**
Message me on the Rethought Textures Discord.
